cause_analysis.narrative: Elixir Beauty Studio churned on 2026-04-13 after 69 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 29-day silence starting 2026-01-06. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 29 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-01-06 via sms, client wrote: "Sorry we missed you! Please reply with a brief message, and someone from Elixir Beauty Studio will get back to you ASAP.…" — no outbound response in 29 days.
